_comment: Per-scene golden hashes + Hamming-distance tolerances for the visual gate. toleranceBits is calibrated from observed CI evidence — see scene metadata for sourcing. The original bootstrap tolerance was 18/256 (~7%, generous default). 2026-05-24 tightening pulled 4 consecutive Linux CI runs (26350318616, 26350764592, 26351054004, 26351253798) and found the Linux-vs-Windows-golden drift is a STABLE 3 bits every run (not jitter — a fixed OS-rendering-pipeline difference, same current hash all four runs). New tolerance sits at ~2.7x observed cross-platform drift, catches any real layout/palette shift (those drift 20-50+ bits), absorbs the small platform delta the Windows-captured golden has against Linux runners.

bothy-idle-seed-42.toleranceSource: 4 Linux CI runs (26350318616, 26350764592, 26351054004, 26351253798) all reported distance=3 against the Windows-captured golden. New tolerance ~2.7x that stable drift. Re-tighten if Linux drift drops or stays at 3 across N>=10 runs; loosen ONLY with evidence of a legitimate true-positive that exceeded the budget.
